underlying_goal: Perform a comprehensive code review of the maimai-assistant project, fix all identified issues, and commit the changes
friction_detail: Test collection failed due to test_validators.py referencing removed functions, requiring Claude to rewrite the test file before tests could pass.
brief_summary: User triggered a /review command for a comprehensive code review; Claude found 23 issues across 13 files, fixed 21 of them, passed all tests, generated a review history, and committed the changes successfully.
